observation_variables.snow_liquid_water_storage_m: derived from mLayerVolFracLiq * mLayerDepth in snow layers

cases.notes: Single canonical Colbeck 1976 case. The staged evaluation.mat carries two target sources keyed numerical_summa and analytical_clark2017. The numerical_summa bundle is derived from the frozen SUMMA validation outputs in KyleKlenk/Laugh-Tests. The analytical_clark2017 bundle is the closed-form Clark 2017 wetting-front / kinematic-wave solution from icemodel.verification.colbeck.analyticalSolution.
